Originally sent: 29.06.2025 00:25
00:26
any contributions are allowed. i just wanted to share this
00:26
-# if you so happen to do. share it on the thread,
00:30
here smth that needed to be fixed atm. if u want to:
Title card need polished code and such Collisions; momentum is obviously not touched. and as such, need to be improved. whatever going on with if you go behind the monitor, you will be dragged to the front. i usually avoid it, but would be nice to fix that this isn't required, but the monitor system need a bit of a redo?
kaøw
here smth that needed to be fixed atm. if u want to:
Title card need polished code and such Collisions; momentum is obviously not touched. and as such, need to be improved. whatever going on with if you go behind the monitor, you will be dragged to the front. i usually avoid it, but would be nice to fix that this isn't required, but the monitor system need a bit of a redo?

00:48

Anakama 30.06.2025 02:18

Portal Speedrun Resource

Skips

  • Chamber 4/5 Save Glitch
  • Chamber 8 Skip
  • Chamber 10 Skip
  • Chamber 13 Low Time Tactic (outdated, 9 is achieved)
  • Chamber 19 Skip (outdated will be updated
Coming Skips: Chamber 11 Skip Chamber 14 Skip Chamber 15 Skip Chamber 17 Skip (Glass Portal Glitch) Chamber 19 Skip (Latest)

Resources

  • Source Unpack 2.5 [Mirror]
-# Contains Half Life 2 and Portal with SST for out of bounds runners.
  • Portal 4104 Package [Mirror]
-# Contains Portal with SST for advanced out of bounds runners.
  • SourceSpeedrunTool (SST) [Mirror]
-# Contains extra commands and auto recording for speedrunning
  • LiveSplit
-# Timer for Portal Speedrunners.
  • Portal Splits [Mirror]
-# Portal Config for LiveSplit
  • PortalTools
-# Allows you to customize your in-game Portals and Portal Gun automatically. # -# Click on the one you wanna open, scroll up for skips (edited)

Phaton pinned a message to this channel. 14.07.2025 14:57
Phaton 14.07.2025 23:15
Forwarded
Hey, I'm just making available the first release of my engine that I've been working on for over a year. It had a lot of transformations and I finally finished it. This is my first project that big and there may be something not explained or typos in the documentation, if you come across any please report to me. There are some things in the engine that acutally did not work, however, I gave a list of what does not work, I will fix it in future releases. I also made 6 some demos (one is unfinished), however, showing in a small way the possibilities of this. The engine has own issues, however, I have described WHY it ACTUALLY does not work. Source Code: https://github.com/FoxiooOfficial/Tails7 Examples: https://foxioo.itch.io/tails7examples
Originally sent: 13.05.2025 22:50
2
23:15
New mode7 engine by Foxioo

Anakama 24.07.2025 19:06
well well well
19:06
What that means is
19:06
If you zip a file and password protect the zip
19:07
An antivirus cannot detect the virus (even if false positive) unless you extract it
19:07
